steps.title: Use the graph intersections
steps.content: A solution to the system is a point where the line and parabola intersect. The question asks for a possible $x$-value, so read an $x$-coordinate at an intersection.

steps.title: Read one possible value
steps.content: On the graph, one intersection is directly above $x=4$. That means $x=4$ is a possible solution value.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The guide lines $y=6$ and $x=4$ identify the displayed intersection value. The answer is A.
